creator: pete@silver.sms.fi
text:
The ports collection has 2.0 version of mpeg_play which is kind-of-oldish
and for example does not support 16/32bpp modes correctly and has it's own
share of bugs.

Fix: 

Replace the mpeg_play with:
ftp://s2k-ftp.cs.berkeley.edu/pub/multimedia/mpeg/play/mpeg_play-2.2-src.tar.gz
The mentioned 2.2 version compiles without further patching on FreeBSD
2.1-STABLE.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install mpeg_play from ports collection.
